# Transp. Code
## Title 1
### Chapter 1. Gen. Provisions
##### § 1.002 — Construction of Code

Chapter 311 (Code Construction Act) , Government Code (Code Construction Act), applies to the construction of each provision in this code except as otherwise expressly provided by this code.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
